title: Epitaph.
content:
All that's beautiful in woman,
        All we in her nature love,
    All that's good in all that's human,
        Passed this gate to courts above.
meaning:
"Epitaph." is a quintessential example of George Pope Morris's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
